---
name: Critique / Objection
about: Structured critique of whitepaper content
title: "[CRITIQUE] "
labels: critique
---

## Section Reference
Link to the relevant whitepaper section.

---

## Problem Statement
Clearly describe the issue or objection.

---

## Evidence / Reasoning
Provide supporting reasoning, references, or analysis.

---

## Proposed Revision (optional)
Suggest how the content could be improved.

---

## System Impact
Describe potential effects on subsystem coherence or implementation.
